mapper.sql: id, customer_code, company_name, company_short_name, industry, company_scale, business_license, legal_representative, registered_capital, establishment_date, registered_address, office_address, contact_name, contact_phone, contact_email, contact_position, company_website, company_introduction, business_scope, status, manager_id, source, remark, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at, deleted
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM customer WHERE customer_code = #{customerCode} AND deleted = 0

SELECT
FROM customer WHERE company_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{companyName}, '%') AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT
FROM customer WHERE industry = #{industry} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT
FROM customer WHERE status = 1 AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT CONCAT('C', DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m'), LPAD(COUNT(*) + 1, 4, '0')) FROM customer WHERE DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y%m') = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m')

SELECT COUNT(*) as total_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as active_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as inactive_count, COUNT(DISTINCT industry) as industry_count FROM customer WHERE deleted = 0
